dailyNews.title: Xi-Trump meeting: US launches trade probe against China over ‘unfair’ practices; will it worsen ties?
dailyNews.description: The US has launched Section 301 trade investigations targeting China ahead of a Trump–Xi summit. Washington cites concerns over industrial overcapacity and forced labour, while analysts say tariffs remain Trump’s key negotiating tool. China’s exports continue to surge despite global criticism.

dailyNews.title: Questions mount for Hegseth over possible US involvement in strike on Iranian school
dailyNews.description: Democrats have written to ask the defence secretary whether the US was responsible, but he says the issue is being investigated.

dailyNews.title: High alert ahead of Oscars 2026? Security tightened after FBI flags possible Iran drone threat
dailyNews.description: Authorities in Los Angeles are tightening security ahead of the 98th Academy Awards following an FBI alert warning of potential drone threats linked to escalating tensions in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Christy Luna: Investigators say they have a new lead in disappearance of an 8-year-old Florida girl in 1984
dailyNews.description: Sgt. Chris Karpinski revealed that Warren Gilbert Williams, named a person of interest in Christy Luna's 1984 disappearance, was remodeling a house when she vanished. Williams had a criminal history and died in 2016. Despite investigations, no remains were found on his property.

dailyNews.title: The war of signals: How Russia and China help Iran see the battlefield
dailyNews.description: Electronic warfare and intelligence sharing are eroding decades of US-Israeli dominance in the Gulf.

dailyNews.title: Chile’s new far-right president is sworn in
dailyNews.description: Chile’s new president Jose Antonio Kast has been sworn in, marking a sharp shift to the right in the country’s politics.

dailyNews.title: SCOOP: Democratic Virginia Gov Spanberger's Republican cousin aims to flip key House seat red
dailyNews.description: Republican Jenny Rae Le Roux, cousin of Democratic Gov. Abigail Spanberger, launches congressional campaign in competitive Orange County, California, U.S. House district, in bid to flip blue seat.

dailyNews.title: Cozy Earth slashes prices for Sleep Week – save on pillows, blankets and pajama sets
dailyNews.description: Sleep Week at Cozy Earth means discounted blankets, sheet sets, pajamas and more.

dailyNews.title: DAVID MARCUS: The more America gives Mamdani, Khalil and the mad bombers, the more they hate us
dailyNews.description: NYC's first Muslim mayor, Zohran Mamdani, faces scrutiny over Ramadan celebrations at Gracie Mansion and alleged connections to activist Mahmoud Khalil.

dailyNews.title: Popular pizza chains face backlash over surging menu prices
dailyNews.description: The Fox News Lifestyle Newsletter brings you trending stories on family, travel, food, neighbors helping neighbors, pets, autos, military veterans, heroes, faith and American values.

dailyNews.title: Kacey Musgraves addresses rumored feud with Miranda Lambert over a song
dailyNews.description: Kacey Musgraves reveals how her rumored feud with Miranda Lambert led to an unexpected collaboration on her upcoming album "Middle of Nowhere," out in May.

dailyNews.title: Grieving Virginia mother tells far-left prosecutor 'do your job' after daughter stabbed to death
dailyNews.description: Virginia mother demands justice after daughter stabbed to death at Fairfax County bus stop, blaming prosecutor for failing to heed warnings about accused killer.

dailyNews.title: Actress Katherine Heigl fires back at critics angry over her attendance at Mar-a-Lago dog rescue event
dailyNews.description: "Grey's Anatomy" star Katherine Heigl fired back at critics angry over her attendance at a Mar-a-Lago dog rescue event which raised $5.5M.

dailyNews.title: US destroys aging Iranian warplanes, video shows
dailyNews.description: During the war against the Islamic Republic of Iran, U.S. Central Command released video footage of strikes against aircraft that were sitting on the ground.

dailyNews.title: Powell's behind-the-scenes move after Trump's DOJ opened its criminal probe
dailyNews.description: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell made 13 calls to lawmakers after the Justice Department opened a criminal probe into his congressional testimony about the Fed's renovations.

dailyNews.title: Ancient sanctuary tied to 'most mysterious' cult uncovered in rare find beneath historic city
dailyNews.description: A rare Roman temple dedicated to mystery cult deity Mithras was discovered in Germany, with the oldest-known sanctuary in Bavaria dating to the first or second centuries A.D.

topStories.title: Iran President Lays Down Three Conditions To End War With US, Israel
topStories.description: There have been widespread speculations about diplomacy between Tehran and Washington in the past few days, with no official confirmation thus far.

topStories.description: Deutsche Bank analysis shows Iran conflict could spark recession if oil price spikes for an extended period, but strong GDP growth provides economic cushion.

topStories.title: Four-time deported Honduran arrested after allegedly shoving elderly Air Force vet onto NYC subway tracks
topStories.description: The Trump admin is calling on NYC officials to honor a detainer against a four-time deported illegal alien with at least 15 prior charges, after he allegedly pushed two men onto the NYC subway tracks.

topStories.description: Beyond talking about the economy and voters’ hardships, the president is showing that he still has control over the Republican Party.

topStories.title: U.S. Trade Deficit Falls in January
topStories.description: The data showed imports dipped and exports rose in the month before the Supreme Court struck down most of the president’s tariffs.

topStories.title: Trump Administration Suggests Tariff Refunds May Take Significant Time
topStories.description: The government must update a federal court on Thursday about its timeline for returning roughly $166 billion in illegal duties.

topStories.title: Trump Documents Missing in Epstein Files Highlight DOJ’s Missteps
topStories.description: In late July, an F.B.I. agent asked colleagues to get started on a sensitive task relating to Jeffrey Epstein, listing the names of 14 prominent men, with President Trump at the top.

dailyNews.title: Iran war complicates Trump's messaging about the economy
dailyNews.description: Rising gas prices and concerns about the war in Iran are complicating President Trump's economic message as he rallies Americans ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump touts economic agenda and Iran war as businesses express concern over oil prices
dailyNews.description: President Trump on Wednesday made stops in Ohio and Kentucky to promote his economic agenda ahead of this year's midterm elections. He also addressed the Iran war and rising gas prices. The cost of oil has already had an impact on some businesses. Weijia Jiang reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump pressures lawmakers to pass bill that would impact American voting requirements
dailyNews.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune says he is being realistic about the SAVE America Act's probability of passing through the upper chamber despite President Trump doubling down on the controversial legislation. CBS News' Taurean Small reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran as at "the end of the line" as Tehran's attacks spill over to oil tankers, ships
dailyNews.description: Iran attacked several Persian Gulf states overnight as the war entered Day 13. This comes as the price of oil continues to rise despite the U.S. announcing measures to tap into its reserves. Also, more details are emerging about the American forces injured in Kuwait and Israel's mission against Iran. CBS News' Natalie Brand and Ramy Inocencio report, and Daniel Shapiro, the former U.S. ambassador to Israel, joins with more insight.

dailyNews.title: Trump to tap strategic oil reserve to bring down gas prices
dailyNews.description: With Iran attacking tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, President Trump and several other countries are tapping emergency reserves to bring down oil prices. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.

dailyNews.description: Trump expects military to do 'more of the same' in Iran

dailyNews.title: Zelenskyy says Ukraine awaits White House sign-off on US drone production deal
dailyNews.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy says he is awaiting White House approval for a major drone production agreement proposed by Kyiv last year

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration launches Section 301 trade probes into Mexico, China, EU, others
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court, in a 6-3 ruling, said President Trump was not authorized by the International Emergency Economic Powers Act, IEEPA, to impose tariffs.
